zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida Longespée The Younger於大約1222年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury47歲，母親Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury37歲。她於大約1235年與Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1271年8月6日之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida Longespée The Younger于大约1222年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury47岁，母亲Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury37岁。她于大约1235年与Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1271年8月6日之后。

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida Longespée The Younger was born about 1222, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, was 47 and her mother, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, was 37. She married Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow about 1235, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died after 6 August 1271.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida Longespée The Younger est née environ 1222, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow environ 1235, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 6 août 1271.

Sie hat um 1235 in England, United Kingdom Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 6. August 1271.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida Longespée The Youngerが約1222年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisburyは47歳，母Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisburyは37歳であった。約1235年にイギリスイギリスでWalter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1271年8月6日以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida Longespée The Younger(이)가 대략 1222년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1235년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1271년 8월 6일 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida Longespée The Younger родилась около 1222 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow около 1235 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 6 августа 1271 г.
